question: What is the BTech fee at LPU?
answer: BTech tuition fee 2024-25: CSE/IT/ECE/EEE — Rs 1,60,000/year. Mechanical/Civil — Rs 1,40,000/year. Payable semester-wise. Additional charges: Hostel Rs 85,000-1,10,000/year, Mess Rs 60,000/year. Scholarship holders pay reduced fees. Visit lpu.in/fees for the latest structure.

question: How can I pay LPU fees online?
answer: Pay through: 1) UMS Portal at ums.lpu.in (recommended), 2) Net banking / Debit / Credit card, 3) NEFT/RTGS to LPU bank account (details in portal), 4) DD in favour of 'Lovely Professional University' payable at Jalandhar. Keep payment receipt. For issues: fees@lpu.in or 01824-404404.
